---
title: "HW4"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r }
setwd('/Users/huangyichen/Desktop/UCHI-QUARTER/2026winter/STATS 2/homework/hw4')
```
#1
```{r }
setwd('/Users/huangyichen/Desktop/UCHI-QUARTER/2026winter/STATS 2/homework/hw4')
library(tidyverse)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)

ohie <- read_csv("OHIE.csv")  

means_tab <- ohie %>%
  group_by(treated) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_ever_medicaid = mean(ever_medicaid, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
means_tab
```
#2
```{r }
setwd('/Users/huangyichen/Desktop/UCHI-QUARTER/2026winter/STATS 2/homework/hw4')
library(tidyverse)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
ohie <- read_csv("OHIE.csv")  
fs <- lm(ever_medicaid ~ treated + numhh_list, data = ohie)
summary(fs)
coeftest(fs, vcov = vcovHC(fs, type = "HC1"))
waldtest(fs, . ~ numhh_list, vcov = vcovHC(fs, type = "HC1"))

```
#3
```{r }
setwd('/Users/huangyichen/Desktop/UCHI-QUARTER/2026winter/STATS 2/homework/hw4')
library(tidyverse)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)

ohie <- read_csv("OHIE.csv")

fs <- lm(ever_medicaid ~ treated + numhh_list, data = ohie)
coeftest(fs, vcov = vcovHC(fs, type = "HC1"))
wald_out <- waldtest(fs, . ~ numhh_list, vcov = vcovHC(fs, type = "HC1"))
print(wald_out)
F_value <- wald_out$F[2]
p_value <- wald_out$`Pr(>F)`[2]

cat("\n---- First-stage partial F for treated (robust) ----\n")
cat("F =", F_value, "\n")
cat("p =", p_value, "\n")

ct <- coeftest(fs, vcov = vcovHC(fs, type = "HC1"))
t_treated <- ct["treated","t value"]
F_from_t2 <- t_treated^2

cat("\n---- Check (single restriction): F = t^2 ----\n")
cat("t =", t_treated, "\n")
cat("F = t^2 =", F_from_t2, "\n")
```
#4
```{r }
setwd('/Users/huangyichen/Desktop/UCHI-QUARTER/2026winter/STATS 2/homework/hw4')
library(tidyverse)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
ohie <- read_csv("OHIE.csv")
d4 <- ohie %>% filter(!is.na(count_visit_dr))
rf <- lm(count_visit_dr ~ treated + numhh_list, data = d4)
fs <- lm(ever_medicaid ~ treated + numhh_list, data = d4)
beta1  <- coef(rf)["treated"]
alpha1 <- coef(fs)["treated"]
ratio <- beta1 / alpha1
cat("N used in both regressions =", nrow(d4), "\n\n")
cat("Reduced form coef on treated (beta1) =", beta1, "\n")
cat("First stage  coef on treated (alpha1) =", alpha1, "\n")
cat("Ratio (beta1/alpha1) =", ratio, "\n")

```
#5
```{r }
library(tidyverse)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
ohie <- read.csv("OHIE.csv")
d <- subset(ohie, !is.na(count_visit_dr))
fs <- lm(ever_medicaid ~ treated + numhh_list, data = d)
summary(fs)
d$ever_hat <- predict(fs, newdata = d)
ss_manual <- lm(count_visit_dr ~ ever_hat + numhh_list, data = d)
summary(ss_manual)
coef(ss_manual)["ever_hat"]
# 和第4题比率核对
rf <- lm(count_visit_dr ~ treated + numhh_list, data = d)
ratio <- coef(rf)["treated"] / coef(fs)["treated"]
ratio
nrow(d)  # 样本量核对
if (!require(AER)) install.packages("AER")
library(AER)

iv <- ivreg(count_visit_dr ~ ever_medicaid + numhh_list | treated + numhh_list, data = d)
summary(iv)   
if (!require(sandwich)) install.packages("sandwich")
if (!require(lmtest)) install.packages("lmtest")
library(sandwich); library(lmtest)

coeftest(iv, vcov. = vcovHC(iv, type = "HC1"))
```
#6
```{r }
setwd('/Users/huangyichen/Desktop/UCHI-QUARTER/2026winter/STATS 2/homework/hw4')
ohie <- read.csv("OHIE.csv")
d <- subset(ohie, !is.na(count_visit_dr))
d$age2 <- d$age^2
if (!require(AER)) install.packages("AER")
library(AER)
iv_base <- ivreg(
  count_visit_dr ~ ever_medicaid + numhh_list |
    treated + numhh_list,
  data = d
)
summary(iv_base)
iv_full <- ivreg(
  count_visit_dr ~ ever_medicaid + numhh_list + female + age + age2 +
    race_white + hs_degree + college_degree + health_baseline |
    treated + numhh_list + female + age + age2 +
    race_white + hs_degree + college_degree + health_baseline,
  data = d
)
summary(iv_full)
b_base <- coef(summary(iv_base))["ever_medicaid", c("Estimate","Std. Error","Pr(>|t|)")]
b_full <- coef(summary(iv_full))["ever_medicaid", c("Estimate","Std. Error","Pr(>|t|)")]
b_base
b_full
nobs(iv_base)
nobs(iv_full)
```
#7
```{r }
setwd('/Users/huangyichen/Desktop/UCHI-QUARTER/2026winter/STATS 2/homework/hw4')
ohie <- read.csv("OHIE.csv")
if (!require(AER)) install.packages("AER")
library(AER)
ohie <- read.csv("OHIE.csv")
ohie$age2 <- ohie$age^2
controls <- c("numhh_list","female","age","age2",
              "race_white","hs_degree","college_degree","health_baseline")
outcomes <- c(
  visit_dr = "count_visit_dr",
  visit_er = "count_visit_er",
  out_of_pocket_spend = "out_of_pocket_spend",
  health_score = "health_score",
  happy = "happy"
)
run_iv <- function(y) {
  f <- as.formula(
    paste0(y, " ~ ever_medicaid + ", paste(controls, collapse = " + "),
           " | treated + ", paste(controls, collapse = " + "))
  )
  m <- ivreg(f, data = ohie)          
  s <- summary(m)
  c(
    IV_estimate = coef(s)["ever_medicaid","Estimate"],
    SE = coef(s)["ever_medicaid","Std. Error"],
    N = nobs(m)
  )
}
res <- t(sapply(outcomes, run_iv))
res <- as.data.frame(res)
res$IV_estimate <- round(res$IV_estimate, 4)
res$SE <- round(res$SE, 4)
res
```
